title: Kconfig: NET_ROUTE assignment error when enabling LICHEN_RPL in gateway native_sim build
description: After adding CONFIG_LICHEN_RPL=y and LORA_LICHEN_GATEWAY_RPL_ROOT, west build fails with 'NET_ROUTE is assigned in a configuration file, but is not directly user-configurable'. Occurs even with -p always. Discovered during test of RPL root init. Likely missing select or dep in LICHEN_RPL or routing Kconfig vs Zephyr net/ip/Kconfig:385. Fix by identifying the selecting symbol (perhaps NET_IPV6 or RPL related) or adjust prj.conf.
